title: NBA Mock Draft 4.0
excerpt: The NBA Draft is creeping closer. We have an updated mock. Plus: Virginia added another rotation piece, the ACC/SEC challenge matchups are set, and more.
author: Samuel Lance

title: Retention Rankings
excerpt: The offseason buzz has been all about the transfer portal, but who's retained the most talent? We have a top 10. Plus: the Duke-Michigan game has moved to an interesting location.
author: Samuel Lance

title: Updated Preseason Top 25
excerpt: Most of the offseason dominoes have fallen, so we're ranking the best teams in the country. Plus: Arizona and Arkansas agreed to a series, Stanford added a lead guard.
author: Sean Paul

title: Big Blue Win
excerpt: Kentucky landed the No. 1 overall prospect in the transfer portal, Milan Momcilovic. How much does he raise UK's national profile? Plus: Team USA's U18s were in action.
author: Tristan Freeman

title: Blue Blood Boost
excerpt: North Carolina added an international prospect to bolster its frontcourt. How much of an impact can he make? Plus: scheduling news, Creighton's prep commitment.
author: Samuel Lance

title: Top 50 Returning Players
excerpt: We rank the players who'll be at the same programs they were in 2025-26. Florida's a big winner. Plus: Where is Momcilovic headed, the ACC's schedule release.
author: Tristan Freeman

title: Decisions Are In
excerpt: The last prospects decide to head to the NBA Draft or stay in school. Plus: two Big East schools pick up key transfers and U.S. Senators are attempting to save college sports.
author: Samuel Lance

title: Give it another year
excerpt: These nine players should play college hoops next season. Here's why. Plus: Christian Anderson and Allen Graves stay in the draft, Matt Able withdraws.
author: Sean Paul

title: Back to school
excerpt: Kentucky, Louisville and Duke all get good news with NBA Draft decisions. Plus: Oklahoma State lands a scoring forward, NC State's big international addition.
author: Mike Miller

title: Eligibility chaos coming?
excerpt: NCAA considering a new blanket 5-year eligibility rule that could upend current roster planning. May could be wild. Plus: Texas Tech has another backcourt scorer.
author: Tristan Freeman

title: Playing GM in a booming NIL market
excerpt: How much is the NIL market spike? Some elite programs are busy weighing their next moves. Plus: Top programs cash in on retention, the Big East surges.
author: Samuel Lance

title: Self return
excerpt: Bill Self announces he'll return with 'renewed clarity' for a 24th season at Kansas. Plus: Tennessee benefits from early player movement, Tom Izzo's surprising revelation.
author: Samuel Lance

title: Bold move
excerpt: New North Carolina coach Michael Malone started his roster revamp with an experienced PG. Plus: Indiana adds three transfers, Nebraska retains an All-Big Ten player.
author: Mike Miller

title: Coaching carousel speeds up
excerpt: Creighton starts a new era, Arizona State and Cincinnati adjust to life in the Big 12, while UNC weighs its future with Hubert Davis.
author: Mike Miller

title: Top target destinations
excerpt: Where are the best available players in the transfer portal considering? Plus: Texas Tech lands CAA POY, Boston College has a big day.
author: Tristan Freeman

title: The weekend in portal hoops
excerpt: Louisville's the early leader when it comes to signing transfers. Plus moves from Houston, Iowa State, Florida, Auburn, Michigan and more.
author: Mike Miller

title: All quiet on the portal front
excerpt: The transfer portal has slowed down — but don't be fooled. The biggest moves are still coming.
author: Tristan Freeman

title: Center of attention
excerpt: How has Lewis Uvwo emerged as one of the top big man prospects? We talked to him about it. Plus: Purdue added a 7-footer, St. John's brought in a prep player.
author: Samuel Lance
